title: mitrasacme maritima
intro: Mitrasacme maritima, also known as the sea broom or sea broom plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to tropical and subtropical coastal regions of Australia and Southeast Asia, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and stems. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from skin irritations and infections. In traditional medicine, the roots and stems of the plant are often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
